titleStmt.title: SII 22.235: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao
No. 235. (A.R. No. 235 of 1906) NORTH ARCOT DISTRICT, CHEYYAR TALUK, TIRUPPANAṄGĀḌU. ŚIVA TEMPLE—ON THE SAME WALL. KULŌTTUṄGA-CHŌḶA I—45th YEAR (A.D. 1114-15)

summary.p: The inscription begins with the introduction Pugaḻmādu viḷaṅga etc. It records a gift of 10 kāśu made by Vēḷaṉ Muḍigoṇḍāṉ alias Śembiyaṉ Vilupparaiyaṉ the headman of Karambiyam in Kīḻvēṅgai-nāḍu a division of Rājarājavaḷanāḍu and deposited with two Śivabrāhmaṇas of the temple of Tiruppaṉaṅgāḍuḍaiyār for burning a perpetual lamp in the temple. The quantity of oil to be supplied by them as monthly interest on the sum received is said to be 3 uḻakku per kāśu.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
pukaḻmātu viḷaṅka jayamātu viru
mpa nilamakaḷ vaḷara malarmakaḷ puṇara Uri
maiyiṟ ciṟanta maṇimuṭi cūṭi miṉa
var nilaikeṭa villavar kulaitara Ēṉai
mannava ririyaluṟṟuḻitara tikkaṉaittun
tan cakkara naṭārtti virasiṅhāsanattu(ttu)
Avanimuḻutumuṭaiyāḷoṭu viṟṟiruntaruḷi
ya kovirācakecaripanmarāna cakkaravarttikaḷ śrī kulo
ttuṅkacoḻadevaṟku yāṇṭu 4 10 5 Āvatu
jayaṅkoṇṭacoḻamaṇṭalattu kāliyūrṟ
koṭṭattu kaḻumalanāṭṭu Uṭaiyār tiruppaṉa
ṅkāṭu Uṭaiyār koyilil śivabrāhmaṇan
kāśyapan periyanampi taṇiyamalaipaṭṭanum kāśya
pan pavaḻakuṉṟu Aṇṇāmalai paṭṭanum Ivvi
ruvom coḻamaṇṭalattu rājarāja vaḷanāṭṭu kiḻ
veṅkaināṭṭu karampiyattu karampiyaṅkiḻān
veḷānmuṭikoṇṭāṉāna cempiyan viḻupparaiyan
Uṭaiyār tiruppanaṅkāṭu Uṭaiyārkku vaitta
tirununtāviḷakku Onṟukku Ivveḷān muṭiko
ṇṭānāna cempiyanviḻupparaiyanpakkal nāṅ
kaḷ kaikkoṇṭa kācu pattu Ikkācu pattukkum ti
ṅkaḷ policai kācu 1- kku Eṇṇai muvvuḻakkāka kā
cu pattukku Eṇṇai Eḻunāḻi Uriyāka polivatākavum polin
ta Eṇṇaiyāle Ittirununtāviḷakku Onṟum muṭṭāme
Erikkakkaṭavomākavum Ikkoyilil śivabrāhmaṇa
kkāṇi vilaikoṇṭārum strīdhanamum dānamum peṟṟāru
m Eṅkaḷ vamśattārum cantirātittavaṟ Ittirunantāviḷa
kku Erikkakkaṭavatāka sammatittu kācu kaikkoṇṭom
kāśyapan Aṇṇāmalaibhaṭṭan Eḻuttu
kāśyapan taṇikaimalaibhaṭṭan Eḻuttu
Ivarkaḷ paṇiyāl Eḻutinen tirukkaṇḍicuvarap peruntac
canen Ivai Enneḻuttu .
Digital edition of SII 22.235 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
